purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 7: The Cleanest Village
description: Videos covering: addition fluency with 3-digit numbers, subtraction with borrowing, reading simple tables and lists

videos.title: Addition of 3-Digit Numbers Review
videos.description: Review how to add 3-digit numbers with and without carrying. You need strong addition skills before working with village data and real-life calculations!
learningObjectives: Add numbers with carrying across place values
Build foundation for multi-step village calculations

videos.title: Subtraction with Borrowing Review
videos.description: Review how to subtract numbers when you need to borrow from the next place value. Subtraction helps us compare data and find differences in village scenarios!
learningObjectives: Build foundation for comparing village data

videos.title: Reading Simple Tables and Lists
videos.description: Learn how to read information from simple tables and lists. In the village chapter, you will need to understand data presented in tables to answer questions!
learningObjectives: Answer questions using data from tables

usageNotes.purpose: Review addition, subtraction, and data reading before learning about community math in Chapter 7
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Addition fluency → Subtraction with borrowing → Reading tables and lists
